title: sports-registry — HTTP routes
description: Tenant-facing catalog read + tenant custom CRUD (Enterprise-only) + hypothetical resolver. Platform-admin catalog administration + reseed support tooling. Every tenant-plane read returns the MERGED catalog (platform-seeded + own tenant customs).

groups.name: tenant-sports
groups.description: Tenant-facing Sport catalog + custom CRUD. Every tenant role can READ the merged catalog (platform + own customs). Writes are Enterprise-only via sports_registry_custom entitlement.

routes.description: Merged catalog list — platform-seeded rows + own tenant customs. filter[category], filter[is_active], filter[is_platform_seeded] (true = platform only, false = customs only), filter[gender_typical], filter[governing_body], search[q] (name + slug), sort[]=sort_order,name,category. Default sort: category asc, sort_order asc, name asc. include=disciplines (hasMany nested include; increases payload size for tenants with 100+ disciplines).

Create a tenant custom Sport (is_platform_seeded auto-forced to false). Body: { name (required), slug (required), category (required), description, governing_body, gender_typical, age_range_min, age_range_max, primary_color, icon, sort_order }. Refused for Small + Medium with SPORTS_REGISTRY_CUSTOM_DISABLED (402). Consumes 1 sports_registry_custom_slot. Slug collision with platform refused with SPORT_KEY_COLLIDES_WITH_PLATFORM (422).
Full Sport row + optional include=disciplines + include=positions (chained nested). include=downstream_reference_count for the count of Wave 3 rows referencing this sport_key.

Update mutable fields on a tenant custom Sport. Refused for platform-seeded rows (they are read-only on the tenant plane). Slug + category + is_platform_seeded + tenant_id are IMMUTABLE. Body: { name, description, governing_body, gender_typical, age_range_min, age_range_max, primary_color, icon, sort_order }.

Hard-delete a tenant custom Sport (rarely used — customs almost never delete once referenced downstream). Refused for platform-seeded (PLATFORM_ROW_HARD_DELETE_FORBIDDEN 403). Refused when Discipline children exist (SPORT_HAS_ACTIVE_DISCIPLINES 409) or downstream references exist (SPORT_REFERENCE_IN_USE 409). To hide a Sport without deleting: use POST /{sport}/deactivate.

Flip is_active=false. Hides from tenant picker; historical downstream references still resolve. Refused for platform-seeded (must be done via platform-admin route). Refused when active Disciplines exist unless ?cascade=true (sweeps active Disciplines + Positions in same transaction).
Flip is_active=true. Refused for platform-seeded (must be done via platform-admin route).

Hypothetical resolver. Query: sport_key (required), discipline_key (optional), position_key (optional). Returns the triple (Sport + Discipline + Position) OR the partial (Sport-only, Sport+Discipline) OR 422 SPORT_KEY_UNRESOLVED / DISCIPLINE_KEY_UNRESOLVED / POSITION_KEY_UNRESOLVED with the search trace. Used by every downstream Wave 3 module to validate a sport_key before writing a row that carries it.
Merged Discipline list. filter[sport_id], filter[sport_key] (string join through Sport.slug), filter[format_type], filter[is_active], filter[is_platform_seeded]. include=positions.

Create a tenant custom Discipline. Body: { sport_id (required), name (required), slug (required), description, format_type, player_count_min, player_count_max, session_duration_default_minutes, sort_order }. Parent Sport validation: same-tenant OR platform-seeded (never cross-tenant). Enterprise-only.
Update mutable fields. Slug + sport_id + is_platform_seeded + tenant_id are IMMUTABLE.
Hard-delete tenant custom. Refused for platform + when Positions or downstream references exist.

Merged Position list. filter[discipline_id], filter[discipline_key], filter[sport_key] (join through Discipline → Sport), filter[is_field_position], filter[is_offensive], filter[is_defensive], filter[is_active], filter[is_platform_seeded].

Create a tenant custom Position. Body: { discipline_id (required), name (required), slug (required), description, is_field_position (required), is_offensive, is_defensive, typical_jersey_range_min, typical_jersey_range_max, sort_order }. Enterprise-only.

groups.name: platform-sports
groups.description: Platform-admin cross-tenant catalog administration. Adding a platform Sport makes it visible to every tenant immediately (cache invalidation is automatic).

routes.description: Cross-tenant list. filter[tenant_id] to slice per tenant, filter[is_platform_seeded]=true for platform-only view.
Create a platform-seeded Sport (is_platform_seeded auto-forced to true, tenant_id auto-forced to NULL). Consumes no entitlement.
Platform-seeded rows never hard-delete; DELETE is aliased to deactivation (is_active=false).

Re-run SportCatalogSeeder against the shipped data/platform-sports-catalog.json. Body: { force: boolean }. Without force, no-ops when the catalog is already fully seeded. With force, upserts every row (adds new, updates existing, deactivates removed). Refused when SeedPlatformSportsCatalogJob or ReconcileSportReferencesJob is already running (RESEED_LOCKED_IN_USE).
Create a platform Discipline under a platform Sport (parent Sport must be platform-seeded — a platform Discipline hanging off a tenant custom Sport is nonsensical).
